name: Roadie Backstage SaaS API
what_it_does: Managed Backstage-as-a-Service platform with REST API — enabling engineering teams to get the power of Spotify's Backstage open-source IDP without self-hosting complexity, with managed plugin ecosystem, automatic upgrades, GitHub/GitLab integration, Tech Docs hosting, and a Backstage-compatible API for catalog management and automation.
use_cases: Managing service catalog via Roadie API for service discovery and ownership tracking
Integrating tool data via Roadie Backstage API for unified developer portal experience
Automating catalog entity registration via Roadie API from CI/CD pipelines
Hosting Tech Docs via Roadie for centralized engineering documentation
Extending Backstage via Roadie plugin marketplace without self-hosting burden
not_for: Self-hosted Backstage control (use open-source Backstage directly for full control)
Teams without GitHub/GitLab (Backstage is deeply Git-centric)
Organizations requiring on-premises deployment (Roadie is cloud SaaS only)
best_when: An engineering team wants Backstage's capabilities without the operational burden of self-hosting — Roadie handles Backstage upgrades, plugin management, and infrastructure, letting teams focus on catalog content.
avoid_when: You need full Backstage customization, on-premises deployment, or want to avoid vendor lock-in on a managed Backstage platform.

auth.notes: API key via Authorization: Bearer header. API key from Roadie account settings. Backstage Catalog REST API at {your-tenant}.roadie.so/api/catalog/. Backstage Software Templates API. Tech Docs API. GitHub/GitLab integration for catalog entity discovery. Roadie broker: secure tunnel for private repo access without VPN. Webhooks for catalog events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — free trial available
pricing.notes: Irish company (Dublin). Founded 2020 by Martina Iglesias Fernandez and Brian Leathem (ex-Red Hat). Backed by Frontline Ventures, Paua Ventures. Roadie hosts and manages Backstage for customers. Tenant URL: {customer}.roadie.so. Roadie Broker: secure connection from Roadie cloud to customer's private network (GitHub Enterprise, private registries). Plugin marketplace: curated Backstage plugins with one-click install. Auto-upgrades: Roadie handles Backstage version upgrades. GDPR compliant (Irish company, EU data residency). Used by: Siemens, Sky, Personio. SaaS pricing: per-tenant flat fee (not per-user).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Backstage Catalog API (not custom API). Tenant URL pattern. Roadie Broker for private repos. Irish company (GDPR). SOC2. Plugin marketplace. Auto-upgrades. Flat per-tenant pricing. Annual contracts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Backstage Catalog API: GET requests idempotent. Entity registration idempotent by kind/namespace/name. Catalog entity updates: PUT is idempotent. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers.
known_agent_gotchas: API is Backstage Catalog API — same endpoints as open-source Backstage, not Roadie-specific
Tenant URL: {your-tenant}.roadie.so — different from open-source Backstage localhost
Roadie Broker: required for accessing private GitHub Enterprise or internal registries
Plugin installation: UI-based marketplace — not configurable via API
Pricing: flat per-tenant fee (not per user) — pricing model differs from most SaaS tools
Backstage entity kinds: must use standard kinds (Component, API, Group, User, etc.) — custom kinds are limited

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token API key. SOC2 and GDPR certified (Irish company, EU data residency). Roadie Broker: secure tunnel avoids opening inbound firewall for private repos. GitHub/GitLab OAuth for catalog discovery — manage app permissions carefully. Service catalog data (ownership, architecture) is sensitive operational IP. Backstage-compatible API: security inherits from Backstage design. Auto-upgrades include security patches — advantage over self-hosted.
